requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — KS CISPR 15 (Radio Disturbance of Lighting Equipment) under PVoC
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 发射——KS CISPR 15（照明设备无线电骚扰）（PVoC 下）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 發射——KS CISPR 15（照明設備無線電騷擾）（PVoC 下）

summary.en: LED luminaires imported into Kenya are verified for radio-disturbance (EMC emissions) performance under the KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme against the relevant Kenya Standard, which adopts CISPR 15 (KS adoption of CISPR 15 / IEC CISPR 15: limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment). It covers conducted disturbances at the mains terminals and radiated disturbances over the regulated frequency range. A KEBS Certificate of Conformity (CoC) confirming compliance must be issued before shipment; the consignment cannot clear at the Port of Mombasa without it. Kenya does not have a single EU-style EMC Directive — the obligation is enforced through the KS standard cited under PVoC plus, for radio-emitting products, separate Communications Authority approval.
summary.zh: 进口至肯尼亚的 LED 灯具，在 KEBS 出口前符合性验证（PVoC）程序下，依据相关肯尼亚标准（采用 CISPR 15 / IEC CISPR 15：电气照明及类似设备无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法）核验其无线电骚扰（EMC 发射）性能。其涵盖电源端传导骚扰及规定频率范围内的辐射骚扰。出货前须签发确认符合性的 KEBS 符合性证书（CoC）；否则货物无法在蒙巴萨港清关。肯尼亚没有单一欧盟式 EMC 指令——该义务通过 PVoC 下引用的 KS 标准执行，且对发射无线电的产品，还须取得通信管理局的单独核准。
summary.zht: 進口至肯亞的 LED 燈具，在 KEBS 出口前符合性驗證（PVoC）程序下，依據相關肯亞標準（採用 CISPR 15 / IEC CISPR 15：電氣照明及類似設備無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法）核驗其無線電騷擾（EMC 發射）性能。其涵蓋電源端傳導騷擾及規定頻率範圍內的輻射騷擾。出貨前須簽發確認符合性的 KEBS 符合性證書（CoC）；否則貨物無法在蒙巴薩港清關。肯亞沒有單一歐盟式 EMC 指令——該義務通過 PVoC 下引用的 KS 標準執行，且對發射無線電的產品，還須取得通信管理局的單獨核准。

standards_or_laws: KEBS Pre-Export Verification of Conformity (PVoC) programme — EMC emissions verification for imported lighting equipment
KS CISPR 15 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (Kenya Standard adopting CISPR 15)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 17743-2017 (Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment), which is technically aligned with CISPR 15. For luminaires sold in China, GB 17743 compliance is required as part of CCC certification (which covers both safety and EMC for relevant product categories). Testing is conducted at CNAS/CMA-accredited laboratories. Chinese CCC EMC test reports are not automatically accepted under the KEBS PVoC route and are verified by the appointed PVoC partner.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 17743-2017（电气照明及类似设备的无线电骚扰特性的限值和测量方法），技术上与 CISPR 15 对齐。在中国销售的灯具须符合 GB 17743，这是相关产品类别 CCC 认证（涵盖安全和 EMC）的组成部分。检测在中国 CNAS/CMA 认可实验室进行。中国 CCC EMC 检测报告不被 KEBS PVoC 路径自动接受，须由指定 PVoC 合作机构核验。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 17743-2017（電氣照明及類似設備的無線電騷擾特性的限值和測量方法），技術上與 CISPR 15 對齊。在中國銷售的燈具須符合 GB 17743，這是相關產品類別 CCC 認證（涵蓋安全和 EMC）的組成部分。檢測在中國 CNAS/CMA 認可實驗室進行。中國 CCC EMC 檢測報告不被 KEBS PVoC 路徑自動接受，須由指定 PVoC 合作機構核驗。

standards_or_laws: GB 17743-2017 — Limits and methods of measurement of radio disturbance characteristics of electrical lighting and similar equipment (SAC/SAMR, aligned with CISPR 15)

gap.en: KS CISPR 15 and GB 17743 are both derived from CISPR 15, so the emission limits are largely harmonized. The practical gaps are procedural rather than technical: (1) Kenya verifies emissions through PVoC and requires a KEBS Certificate of Conformity per consignment (or under a registered/licensed route) before shipment — a CN CCC certificate alone does not satisfy this and the test reports must be submitted to and accepted by the appointed PVoC partner; (2) the test report should come from a laboratory accepted by the PVoC partner (ILAC MRA-recognised accreditation is typically expected) and reference the KS / CISPR 15 edition in force; (3) where the luminaire incorporates wireless functionality (e.g., Bluetooth dimming, Wi-Fi smart lighting), separate Communications Authority (CA) type approval applies — there is no single combined directive as in the EU. Confirm the applicable PVoC route (consignment, registration, or licensing) for the supplier's export volume.
gap.zh: KS CISPR 15 与 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，发射限值基本协调。实际差距以程序性为主而非技术性：（1）肯尼亚通过 PVoC 核验发射，出货前须按每批货（或在已注册/许可路径下）取得 KEBS 符合性证书——仅有中国 CCC 证书不满足该要求，检测报告须提交并经指定 PVoC 合作机构接受；（2）检测报告应来自 PVoC 合作机构接受的实验室（通常预期具备 ILAC MRA 认可的资质），并引用现行 KS / CISPR 15 版本；（3）若灯具集成无线功能（如蓝牙调光、Wi-Fi 智能照明），则另须取得通信管理局（CA）型号核准——不存在欧盟式单一合并指令。请就供应商的出口量确认适用的 PVoC 路径（逐批、注册或许可）。
gap.zht: KS CISPR 15 與 GB 17743 均源自 CISPR 15，發射限值基本協調。實際差距以程序性為主而非技術性：（1）肯亞通過 PVoC 核驗發射，出貨前須按每批貨（或在已注冊/許可路徑下）取得 KEBS 符合性證書——僅有中國 CCC 證書不滿足該要求，檢測報告須提交並經指定 PVoC 合作機構接受；（2）檢測報告應來自 PVoC 合作機構接受的實驗室（通常預期具備 ILAC MRA 認可的資質），並引用現行 KS / CISPR 15 版本；（3）若燈具集成無線功能（如藍牙調光、Wi-Fi 智能照明），則另須取得通信管理局（CA）型號核准——不存在歐盟式單一合並指令。請就供應商的出口量確認適用的 PVoC 路徑（逐批、注冊或許可）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emissions compliance to KS CISPR 15 is verified under the KEBS PVoC programme; a Certificate of Conformity is required before the consignment can be imported and cleared
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 17743-2017 compliance required as part of CCC certification for luminaires sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] LED luminaires entering Kenya are verified for EMC emissions to KS CISPR 15 under the KEBS PVoC programme, and a Certificate of Conformity is required before import. Emission limits are broadly harmonized with CN GB 17743 (both CISPR 15-derived), but a CN CCC certificate alone does not satisfy PVoC — test reports must be submitted to and accepted by the appointed PVoC partner. Smart luminaires with wireless functions additionally require Communications Authority (CA) approval. There is no single EU-style EMC Directive in Kenya.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进入肯尼亚的 LED 灯具在 KEBS PVoC 程序下按 KS CISPR 15 核验 EMC 发射，进口前须取得符合性证书。发射限值与中国 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本协调，但仅有中国 CCC 证书不满足 PVoC——检测报告须提交并经指定 PVoC 合作机构接受。集成无线功能的智能灯具还须取得通信管理局（CA）核准。肯尼亚不存在欧盟式单一 EMC 指令。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進入肯亞的 LED 燈具在 KEBS PVoC 程序下按 KS CISPR 15 核驗 EMC 發射，進口前須取得符合性證書。發射限值與中國 GB 17743（均源自 CISPR 15）基本協調，但僅有中國 CCC 證書不滿足 PVoC——檢測報告須提交並經指定 PVoC 合作機構接受。集成無線功能的智能燈具還須取得通信管理局（CA）核准。肯亞不存在歐盟式單一 EMC 指令。

requirement_topic.en: EMC Immunity and Radio Approval — KS IEC 61547 / Communications Authority Type Approval
requirement_topic.zh: EMC 抗扰度与无线核准——KS IEC 61547 / 通信管理局型号核准
requirement_topic.zht: EMC 抗擾度與無線核准——KS IEC 61547 / 通信管理局型號核准

summary.en: Immunity performance for lighting equipment in Kenya is addressed through the Kenya Standard adopting IEC 61547 (KS IEC 61547: equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements), which is referenced within the PVoC technical assessment where applicable. Separately, any luminaire with radio-transmitting functionality (Bluetooth, Wi-Fi, Zigbee smart lighting) requires Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) type approval / acceptance before it can be sold or operated, in addition to the KEBS PVoC for safety and emissions. Immunity testing for non-radio lighting is generally treated as part of the EMC technical documentation rather than as a standalone mandatory licensing step; verify with the appointed PVoC partner which immunity evidence is required for the specific product category.
summary.zh: 肯尼亚对照明设备抗扰度性能通过采用 IEC 61547 的肯尼亚标准处理（KS IEC 61547：一般照明设备——EMC 抗扰度要求），在适用时纳入 PVoC 技术评估引用。另外，任何具备无线发射功能的灯具（蓝牙、Wi-Fi、Zigbee 智能照明）在销售或使用前，除针对安全和发射的 KEBS PVoC 外，还须取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）型号核准/接受。对非无线照明的抗扰度检测，通常作为 EMC 技术文件的一部分处理，而非独立的强制许可步骤；请向指定 PVoC 合作机构核实具体产品类别所需的抗扰度证据。
summary.zht: 肯亞對照明設備抗擾度性能通過採用 IEC 61547 的肯亞標準處理（KS IEC 61547：一般照明設備——EMC 抗擾度要求），在適用時納入 PVoC 技術評估引用。另外，任何具備無線發射功能的燈具（藍牙、Wi-Fi、Zigbee 智能照明）在銷售或使用前，除針對安全和發射的 KEBS PVoC 外，還須取得肯亞通信管理局（CA）型號核准/接受。對非無線照明的抗擾度檢測，通常作為 EMC 技術文件的一部分處理，而非獨立的強制許可步驟；請向指定 PVoC 合作機構核實具體產品類別所需的抗擾度證據。

standards_or_laws: KS IEC 61547 — Equipment for general lighting purposes — EMC immunity requirements (Kenya Standard adopting IEC 61547)
Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) — type approval / acceptance for radio-transmitting equipment (Kenya Information and Communications Act)

summary.en: China's immunity equivalent is GB/T 18595-2014 (General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment), technically equivalent to IEC 61547. GB/T 18595 is a recommended standard (T = tuijian, recommended) and is less strictly enforced than the CN emissions standard GB 17743. For wireless-enabled luminaires sold in China, SRRC (State Radio Regulation Commission) type approval is additionally required. CCC certification for CN luminaires generally focuses more on safety and emissions than immunity.
summary.zh: 中国抗扰度对应标准为 GB/T 18595-2014（照明设备的电磁抗扰度要求），技术上等同于 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 为推荐性标准（T = 推荐），执行力度弱于中国发射标准 GB 17743。对于在中国销售的无线灯具，还须取得国家无线电管理委员会（SRRC）型号核准。针对中国灯具的 CCC 认证通常更侧重安全和发射而非抗扰度。
summary.zht: 中國抗擾度對應標準為 GB/T 18595-2014（照明設備的電磁抗擾度要求），技術上等同於 IEC 61547。GB/T 18595 為推薦性標準（T = 推薦），執行力度弱於中國發射標準 GB 17743。對於在中國銷售的無線燈具，還須取得國家無線電管理委員會（SRRC）型號核准。針對中國燈具的 CCC 認證通常更側重安全和發射而非抗擾度。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 18595-2014 — General requirements for the electromagnetic immunity of lighting equipment (SAC/SAMR — recommended standard, aligned with IEC 61547)
SRRC type approval — required for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

gap.en: On immunity, KS IEC 61547 and CN GB/T 18595 share the same IEC 61547 technical base, so a product already tested to GB/T 18595 generally meets the technical content; the gap is documentation — the immunity evidence must be presented in the form the PVoC partner accepts. The more significant gap is radio approval: a smart/wireless luminaire requires Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) type approval, a Kenya-specific national step that the CN SRRC approval does not satisfy and that runs in parallel to the KEBS PVoC. Manufacturers must (1) keep KS IEC 61547-aligned immunity evidence in the technical file, and (2) for any radio-transmitting model, obtain CA type approval through the in-country importer before sale. Confirm with the PVoC partner whether standalone immunity testing is required for the specific category.
gap.zh: 在抗扰度方面，KS IEC 61547 与中国 GB/T 18595 同以 IEC 61547 为技术基础，已按 GB/T 18595 检测的产品通常满足技术内容；差距在于文件——抗扰度证据须以 PVoC 合作机构接受的形式提交。更重要的差距是无线核准：智能/无线灯具须取得肯尼亚通信管理局（CA）型号核准，这是肯尼亚特有的国家步骤，中国 SRRC 核准不能满足，且与 KEBS PVoC 并行。制造商须：（1）在技术文件中保留与 KS IEC 61547 一致的抗扰度证据；（2）对任何发射无线电的型号，在销售前通过本地进口商取得 CA 型号核准。请向 PVoC 合作机构确认具体类别是否须进行独立抗扰度检测。
gap.zht: 在抗擾度方面，KS IEC 61547 與中國 GB/T 18595 同以 IEC 61547 為技術基礎，已按 GB/T 18595 檢測的產品通常滿足技術內容；差距在於文件——抗擾度證據須以 PVoC 合作機構接受的形式提交。更重要的差距是無線核准：智能/無線燈具須取得肯亞通信管理局（CA）型號核准，這是肯亞特有的國家步驟，中國 SRRC 核准不能滿足，且與 KEBS PVoC 並行。製造商須：（1）在技術文件中保留與 KS IEC 61547 一致的抗擾度證據；（2）對任何發射無線電的型號，在銷售前通過本地進口商取得 CA 型號核准。請向 PVoC 合作機構確認具體類別是否須進行獨立抗擾度檢測。

mandatory_status.target: Immunity: assessed via KS IEC 61547 within PVoC technical documentation where applicable. Radio approval: mandatory — Communications Authority of Kenya (CA) type approval required for wireless-enabled luminaires before sale or operation
mandatory_status.cn: Immunity: recommended — GB/T 18595-2014 is a recommended (non-mandatory) standard. Radio: SRRC type approval mandatory for wireless-enabled luminaires in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] In Kenya, lighting EMC immunity is addressed through KS IEC 61547 within the PVoC technical documentation rather than a standalone mandatory licence, so products tested to CN GB/T 18595 generally meet the technical base and the gap is documentation. The decisive Kenya-specific step for smart/wireless luminaires is Communications Authority (CA) type approval, which CN SRRC approval does not satisfy and which runs in parallel to the KEBS PVoC. Keep KS IEC 61547-aligned immunity evidence in the technical file and obtain CA type approval for any radio-transmitting model before sale.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在肯尼亚，照明 EMC 抗扰度通过 PVoC 技术文件中的 KS IEC 61547 处理，而非独立强制许可，因此按中国 GB/T 18595 检测的产品通常满足技术基础，差距在于文件。智能/无线灯具的关键肯尼亚特有步骤是通信管理局（CA）型号核准，中国 SRRC 核准不能满足，且与 KEBS PVoC 并行。请在技术文件中保留与 KS IEC 61547 一致的抗扰度证据，并在销售前为任何发射无线电的型号取得 CA 型号核准。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在肯亞，照明 EMC 抗擾度通過 PVoC 技術文件中的 KS IEC 61547 處理，而非獨立強制許可，因此按中國 GB/T 18595 檢測的產品通常滿足技術基礎，差距在於文件。智能/無線燈具的關鍵肯亞特有步驟是通信管理局（CA）型號核准，中國 SRRC 核准不能滿足，且與 KEBS PVoC 並行。請在技術文件中保留與 KS IEC 61547 一致的抗擾度證據，並在銷售前為任何發射無線電的型號取得 CA 型號核准。
